name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or workflow improvement for OrbitDeck
title: "Feature request - *Add short descriptor here*"

---

##### Any feature request raised here should be submitted according to this template or it may be flagged with `Needs more information`. No action will be taken until the required information is provided.

## Feature request

#### Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the current problem, limitation, or operator pain point.

#### Which OrbitDeck surface is affected?

- [ ] Rotator / live pass
- [ ] Radio control
- [ ] APRS ops
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Lite UI
- [ ] Backend / API
- [ ] Docs / packaging / release

#### Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

#### Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions, workflows, or designs you've considered.

#### Operator / hardware context

If relevant, include browser, OS, radio model, transport mode, APRS mode, and whether the request is for real-pass operation, fake-pass testing, or both.

#### Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, sketches, or examples here.

<hr>

###### DO NOT DELETE OR EDIT anything below this

<hr>

<sub><b>Note 1:</b> Make sure to add all the information needed to understand the request. If essential information is missing, the issue may be marked <code>Needs more information</code>.</sub>

<sub><b>Note 2:</b> Requests that change operator workflow should explain the problem being solved, not just the preferred label or layout.</sub>
